title: Short title
doc_html:
CHAPTER 17.  LOUISIANA RECLAIMED WATER LAW

§2391.  Short title

This Chapter shall be known and may be cited as the "Louisiana Reclaimed Water Law".

Acts 2003, No. 985, §1.
